name: Strawberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Crust: Combine graham cracker crumbs and sugar in a bowl. Stir in melted butter until well mixed. Press into a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes, then cool.
Reduce oven temperature to 300°F. Filling: In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add sugar, beating until fluffy. Stir in lemon peel and vanilla extract. Add eggs one at a time, mixing gently after each addition. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
Bake for 1 hour or until set in the center. Allow to cool to room temperature. Prepare the strawberry glaze by blending sugar and cornstarch in a saucepan with water and mashed strawberries. Cook until thickened and boiling, stirring constantly. Let cool before spreading over the cheesecake. Chill for 3 hours before serving.
